$comment: Starter profile config. The default `ollama-local` profile uses one model for everything (qwen3.5:4b — also the default rerank model, so it's already pulled). Works zero-config. Upgrade to a real provider for production work by editing or switching to one of the other profiles.

ollama-local.description: Single-model self-hosted starter. Uses the rerank model for everything — works the moment you finish install.sh. Upgrade by editing this profile or switching to one configured for your provider.

ollama-local-multi.description: Multi-model self-hosted setup. You need to `ollama pull` each of these. Better quality than `ollama-local`, no external API.

ollama-cloud.description: All buckets on Ollama Cloud — useful when other plans are exhausted.

nvidia-nim.description: NVIDIA NIM-hosted models. Visual falls back to pro (NIM lacks a strong vision-chat model in this matrix).

deepseek-official.description: Official DeepSeek API for pro/flash. Other buckets pick a sensible fallback — replace with what you have.
